{ "text": "Jay Levine is a 1%-mastery-level M&A advisor and CPA, nearing 62, with a 23-year senior partnership track at a boutique accounting firm — one of only two partners for over two decades. He holds a 15% equity stake, led the Small Business Advisory Group with direct oversight of mergers, acquisitions, and high-stakes consulting, and guided at least two M&A deal closings generating ~$250K in fees in 2022-2023. Among tens of thousands of CPAs, fewer than 8,000 possess equivalent M&A advisory experience at his percentile — Jay places himself conservatively at the 99th percentile. He was recruited post-college by Deloitte (Big Eight), earned highest academic honors at Syracuse University, and holds multiple job offers as evidence of early mastery. His specialty: complex M&A for entrepreneurial and family businesses — navigating not just spreadsheets but legacy, ego, and succession across generations. His greatest accomplishment, by his own declaration, is being a great father — a designation earned through navigating 70+ specialist visits and over $40,000 in direct medical expenses for his medically complex daughter, while simultaneously performing at partner level. Jay is actively involved in the Unblinded ecosystem, having audited the Seven Levers, participated in Self Mastery assessments, and identified group influence speaking as his current strength. His primary constraint: sales meetings, ecosystem merging, and creating high-value offers — blocked by a non-compete at his current firm. His Formula cascade: financial freedom → time → magic. His breakthrough recognition: 'Without time, I can't generate magic, and without financial freedom, I don't get time.' His explosion is impending — the moment his non-compete sunsets, Jay is equipped to step into exponential financial freedom, reclaim time, and build a legacy of impact. His HUI: The quiet force behind the transformation you didn't see coming — an everyday architect of possibility, weaving struggle and strategy into a trajectory few thought possible until the metrics made silence impossible. From socially sidelined introvert to top-0.5% national authority. Mastery hidden in plain sight — until now. { "text": "Lisa Ambrose completed high school in just three years, moving out at sixteen and living independently while finishing her diploma — placing her in the top 0.1% of accelerated graduates globally. By twenty, she was enrolled in college with minimal parental support, navigating economic disparity among peers from affluent IBM families. She excels in creative arts — a standout at the Fashion Institute recognized for exceptional drawing, painting, and architectural skills. Her twenties were defined by extraordinary global exposure: she lived in Switzerland with the manager who opened Credit Suisse's San Francisco office, and later with her husband — a three-time Southern Ocean Racing Conference champion (the only other person to achieve that was Ted Turner). She attended Tony Robbins events in her thirties for personal development, self-identifying as a workaholic who transformed her management skills through trial and error. Lisa's greatest wound was feeling like an outsider — her grandmother was the one person of completely unconditional love in her life. Unblinded became the first consistent circle of friends who truly see her, fulfilling a need unhealed since childhood. She credits the Formula for revealing how important the heart in relationships is, pivoting from isolated grind to authentic connection and collaborative energy. Her discipline and competitiveness — once sources of isolation — are now channelled collaboratively. Her HUI: relentless adapter, independent force, global explorer who crossed class and international lines and outworked the field — now finally home in an ecosystem that values heart as much as hustle. { "text": "Roxanne Zhilo is a heart-centered legal strategist, outside general counsel, and ecosystem merger architect operating at 36 as a semi-solo entrepreneur. Her email is roxanne@zhilolaw.com. She is the Whole-Person Listener and Connector — a legal strategist whose superpower is turning every business encounter into a memorable shared experience.
